style_profile.background: neon highlighter yellow flat or radial
style_profile.accent_role: black for type, white for CTA bubbles, brand logos as colored accents
style_profile.typography: ultra-bold mixed-case sans, mixed roman+script highlight on key word ('Paid')
style_profile.layout: collage / multi-element, money + platform-logo bubbles around phone mockup
style_profile.mockup_treatment: phone with TikTok/IG-style feed visible, 3D dollar / heart props
style_profile.callouts: white pill bubbles with platform logo + dollar amount (e.g. '+$439')
